name: oa-agent
description: Agent-Native OA — 對話式表單填寫 Agent（monorepo：server + client + shared）

scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w ui && npm run typecheck -w sdk && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w admin
